title: VXG Power Flatness — NPI Test Bench

panels.title: Output Power vs Frequency (1–20 GHz) — all units
panels.description: Each line is one simulated unit under test. Tolerance band: ±0.5 dB. Curves that drop below −0.5 dBm or spike above +0.5 dBm indicate a failing unit.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "vxg_tests")
  |> range(start: -2h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "PowerFlatness" and r._field == "power_dbm")
  |> group(columns: ["unit_id"])

panels.title: Unit Yield — Pass / Fail per Unit
panels.description: 55% yield shown here is realistic for a new product line in early NPI. Rows highlighted red have at least one out-of-spec frequency point.

panels.title: Production Yield
panels.description: % of units with zero out-of-spec points across the full 1–20 GHz sweep.

panels.title: Failure Mode
panels.description: Most common failure pattern in this production run.
